descFull: Use IA as an agent without an API key. $0. Harvest your browser session for Gemini (guest, no login), Claude.ai, Claude Code, Kimi.com, Qwen, DeepSeek — drive them like an API, no per-token billing. Plus LiteLLM (100+ paid providers), local models via Ollama, /lang in 34 languages, Mesa Redonda, voice, OCR, MemPalace, embedded sandbox OS.
